programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A restored village in Italy prepares to host its first guests and the owners of a derelict French hamlet begin renovating their most cherished building. In Puglia, renovations on a quirky hamlet grind to a halt leaving the owners devastated

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Barbara and Leigh met on the island of Cyprus 20 years ago and even got married there. Now they want to buy a holiday home near Famagusta, close to nightlife, beaches and family oriented towns. Ben Hillman comes up with five options for their £120,000 budget, from apartments with pools to a countryside complex

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Newcomer Tom officially moves aboard his own boat and begins navigating the uncharted waters of solo living - complete with a gourmet dinner for one. Gen launches her very own podcast, but can she stay afloat balancing broadcast dreams with university deadlines? Josh and Hayley's boat, Darth Vader, powers up for its journey south from Lincoln to Milton Keynes. Adam at the Canal and River Trust is making waves of a different kind, using innovative technology to bring water management on the canals into the modern age

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: In Bordeaux, Deanne and Richard hoist a very expensive 1950s chandelier into place as they race to finish their Brigitte Bardot-inspired bedroom and in Périgueux, Lia and Richard tackle their dilapidated kitchen. In Saint-Émilion, Janey and Steve put in the work to bring their dream en-suite bathroom to life

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Manjit and Zarrar from Leeds hunt for a holiday home in Almeria with help from father-and-son duo Steve and Shaun Garner and the Rodriguez sisters are in Alicante helping Dave and Paula find a holiday home for their budget of 90,000 euros

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The remaining teams take on the tantalising feast that is pastry. In their first challenge, the teams create 24 savoury laminated tarts and get creative with 24 cream buns. Their showpiece challenge demands precision and flair as they build modern landmarks solely out of biscuit, accompanied by impeccably shaped petit gâteaux, in a towering test of skill, structure and nerve

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: The war between Leo and Clive reaches a shocking climax. Clive's house becomes a tinderbox of raw emotion as George's secrets spread across town, and even Saul can't stop the onslaught of anger. Zee desperately tries to help, but Leo does exactly the wrong thing as violence explodes on Calico Road and everyone's lives are changed for ever

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Henry is brought to Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham after being hit accidentally by a forklift truck driven by his dad. X-rays confirm that both his legs are broken. Nahum and Dean arrive by ambulance following a road traffic accident, and 94-year-old Pearl comes in after badly cutting her arm by trapping it in a lift

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Surgeons Brett and Pete use bone hooks and levers to try pull paratrooper Lee's pelvis out of his spinal canal after a high-speed paragliding accident in France. In south-west London, 86 year-old Veronica comes into St George's Hospital with an open ankle fracture after a car accident but doctors worry there's a vascular injury and she could lose her foot. At St Mary's, Heidi has surgery after a vicious dog attack and 56 year-old plasterer Lee is brought in by air ambulance after a car crash where emergency doctors took over an hour to extract him from the vehicle

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Property developer Guy Phoenix buys and renovates a £16million apartment in Monaco, the biggest investment and financial risk he has ever taken. In this second of two programmes, as he navigates the intricacies of building in one of the most expensive places to live on the planet, Guy comes under pressure to complete his luxury apartment in time for the upcoming Monaco Grand Prix. As the finish line gets closer, the pressure and stress on both him and his crack team of builders becomes almost unbearable

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Paul and Glenda kick off the competition in their static caravan, but eyebrows are raised at his unromantic approach to his relationship. On day two self-confessed gadget geek David and his partner Jane show their competitive side with a confidently presented, well-received meal. Finally outdoorsy twentysomethings Matt and Polly show off their 'good life' approach to cooking with a home-grown feast

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple planning to transform a 1960s ambulance into a campervan, and an artist who has commissioned a giant wooden floating egg to use as a work and living space. He also discovers a novel way of turning a suburban basement in Nottingham into an aquarium, and begins his own project to create a fantasy tree house in the grounds of the Kielder National Park in Northumberland

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Travel specialists Gareth and Hihine try to throw a more civilised evening, based around a generations-old family Asian menu. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. Like a particularly fair magistrate, Taskmaster Greg Davies perches on his big chair and passes judgement on what number-cruncher Alex Horne has placed before him. Unlike a magistrate, Greg is faced with things like Babátúndé Aléshé shouting about a fortune cookie, Emma Sidi learning about perspective, and Andy Zaltzman prophesying the end of the world. Meanwhile, Rosie Jones feels badly let down by her teammate, Jack Dee

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Sean Lock face off once again in another unpredictable battle of words and numbers, with help from Kevin Bridges and Rebecca Front. Rachel Riley is on maths-and-letters duty, and Joe Lycett is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dad's annual hinge oiling evening arrives, but when he spills some of the commodity on Mum's beloved carpet, it's a race against time to clean it up before she finds out. Meanwhile, Jim gets a cat. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter star in this instalment of the award-winning comedy, also featuring John Sessions as Mr Morris, the carpet cleaner

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Much to his delight Adam has finally been recognised for his musical talent, but his achievement is overshadowed when Jonny arrives home and announces he has got married. Family comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy meets his hero - techno musician Russell 'The Orgazoid' - and ends up working as his handyman. However, the job seems to consist of making smoothies and swimming in his employer's pool - sparking speculation over the star's intentions. Mark goes to a school reunion and considers embarking on an illicit affair

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy organises Mark's stag weekend, which sees them set sail on a canal boat. The voyage seems to be a complete washout until a girl arrives to spice things up. Meanwhile, the groom-to-be gets offered an exciting job in India, providing a possible way out of his impending marriage to Sophie

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: Alice helps Jack rid himself of a tattoo that reminds him of a romance he'd rather forget, Glen licks Gabriela's tatt into shape and Sketch covers Eileen's saucy self-portrait. Kurt gets divorced from his mysterious marriage inking, Frazer covers his cheesy chat-up line and Aimee obtains an awesome original

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sam Dushey, the CEO of Shoppers World, goes undercover in his own company. Since taking over the family business, Sam has made it his mission to expand Shoppers World rapidly, and he wants to make sure all of his stores are performing up to his high standards as the business grows. Among the employees he meets are a woman who has worked for the company for eight years without a pay rise, and another who was attacked with pepper spray while trying to stop a robbery

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Tim Betts, the CEO of Muscle Maker Grill, goes undercover in the company he recently bought. Tim wants to make sure the brand is healthy and continues to expand, and he believes it's key that as they grow, each restaurant branch follows the same set of corporate standards. Tim thinks it's the perfect time to learn what's working and what needs an overhaul, so he meets staff including franchisees, a delivery driver, a food truck manager and a cashier whose flirtatious manner shocks him

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi hope for more good luck as the buyers return to San Diego, while Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary learns a harsh lesson about Dave at auctions in Rancho Palos Verdes, California, while Rene puts a secret strategy to the test

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in the West Country, bossy Tam and her husband Stuart's evening of local cuisine impresses some of their guests. On day two Ian, Phil and their houseboat take centre stage, with all the guests excited to get on board - particularly Tam and Stuart, who get to grips with the boat's horn. However, the fishy menu is definitely more sink than swim for some. Finally, competitive American duo Kyle and Renee serve up a surprise Italian menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Northamptonshire, loved-up luvvies Anna and Coylah hope their menu will reflect their personalities, while Felicity and Lawrence, and Martin and Dawn also compete

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fun-loving prison officer Noel is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to fiancee Jemma, who looks after their daughter Heidi full-time. The bride-to-be longs for a picturesque local wedding and to be treated like a princess for the day, but her groom has his sights set on a ceremony in the party resort of Magaluf, on the Spanish island of Majorca

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Mike takes sole charge of planning his wedding to fiancee Becky. The bride-to-be dreams of a stylish, elegant ceremony, but her groom wants to spend their £12,000 budget on a celebration devoted to his sport

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sharon John, the president and CEO of Build-a-Bear Workshop, goes undercover in her company to work alongside the employees who custom-build stuffed animals in retail outlets and shops, and who work in the distribution warehouse and shipping department

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Karen Freeman-Wilson, the Mayor of Gary, Indiana, aims to reverse her city's economic decline and population loss. She dons a disguise to meet the city's workforce, including a sanitation plant operator, a fire fighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance worker

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, hip-hop enthusiasts Christine and Terry provide a hearty menu for their guests, before allotment owners Tim and Amanda host with a menu dedicated to their home-grown fruit and veg. programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. As the series rockets towards an exciting conclusion, the five competing comics are increasingly willing to do anything for points. programme.title: Friday Night Dinner

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The occasion of Uncle Saul's funeral heralds the return of 'Horrible Grandma', who leaves a trail of broken furniture in her wake. Award-winning comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Sophie's big day arrives, but as the groom makes his way to the church with best man Jeremy and a very hung-over Super Hans, he continues to wrestle with crippling doubts that threaten to throw the event into disarray. Starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark rediscovers the single life following his disastrous marriage to Sophie, while he and Jeremy become victims of crime. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: This episode, the pop-up parlour in the sun gets a visit from Peter, who needs assistance to fix his shocking cock-up. Also popping into the studio are Lise, who wants rid of a tattoo in honour of her snakey ex, gold-medal-winning Simon, whose power-lifting image needs a reboot, and Olivia, who is keen to get her rubbish writing erased.Series Prod: Lucie Rake; Exec Prods: Tim Harcourt, Matt J Smith; Prod Co: Studio Lambert

Who will take home the £1,000 prize money?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The end is nigh for fantasy fan Evan as he plans to wage war on his wedding day. However, his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key family affair. Will this noble groom make his bride feel like a queen, or will Evan's epic Game of Thrones-inspired plan be an epic fail?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Modern Family

Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All three families trying to cope with their separate holiday experiences, before everyone tries to make their way back home in time for Father's Day. The Dunphys are wrapping up their trip to New York City, while Cam and Mitchell are caring for Cam's dying grandmother in Missouri, and Jay, Gloria and Manny are attending a wedding in Mexico - but all of their respective trips are thrown into turmoil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay tries to make a good impression on his new neighbours, while Cam and Mitchell attempt to teach Lily a message of acceptance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane is on the cards when Homer finds an old film strip, leading to family flashbacks telling the story of Bart and Lisa's troublesome toddler years - and how they got into their first fight

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: There's a death in Springfield, while Krusty's confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homer's safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge signs Homer and Bart up on a father-son bonding ocean voyage in a bid to heal their troubled relationship, and while the pair are away takes over Homer's fantasy football league. Animation, featuring the voice of Nick Offerman (Parks and Recreation)

programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts go head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is to run for senior class president against Manny. Phil insists on introducing Haley to marketing guru Merv Schechter (guest star Martin Short), while Cam makes a rash decision when he finds out his star football player is moving away

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes the king of barbecues in Springfield after buying a grill from a mysterious man at a roadside shack and ends up being challenged to a cook-off by a TV chef

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge's twin sisters Selma and Patty agree to stop smoking after they learn their father died of lung cancer. When Selma relapses after just 10 minutes, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer. Meanwhile, Maggie goes on an adventure with some local creatures

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam accidentally gets Barry kicked out of his cool group of friends, so he comes up with a plan to get his brother back in favour by convincing them he has the hacking skills to access the school's computer system to change their grades. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 27-year-old flight attendant Alex from Bristol. Having never had a serious relationship, he is hoping to land himself a man for the long haul. He is followed by 26-year-old Laura from Gloucestershire, a horse-loving country girl who is looking for love

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, focusing their attentions on Sitting on a Fortune, Close to Me, You, Nadiya's Fast Flavours, Animal, UFO Witness, This Morning's Spin to Win feature and the ITV News. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions as the village gathers for Diane's funeral, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them. A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families. Also, Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and a couple's relationship might be over before it has begun

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north Kent coast compete, with engaged Emma and Craig kicking things off with their menu of simple fare, but the starter isn't popular and there are issues with the dessert. Darren and Dan are next up and their food goes down a storm, while well-to-do Edward and Catherine conclude proceedings, hoping to impress with their grand house and fine dining. Who will take home the £1,000 prize money?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The end is nigh for fantasy fan Evan as he plans to wage war on his wedding day. However, his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key family affair. Will this noble groom make his bride feel like a queen, or will Evan's epic Game of Thrones-inspired plan be an epic fail?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tuckers board the train for an eventful journey to Dede's wedding. Claire and Mitchell work on their speech, Phil and Cam are starstruck when they spot their favourite author on the train, Manny and Luke go girl crazy and Gloria finds herself stuck in a frustrating situation. Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All three families trying to cope with their separate holiday experiences, before everyone tries to make their way back home in time for Father's Day. The Dunphys are wrapping up their trip to New York City, while Cam and Mitchell are caring for Cam's dying grandmother in Missouri, and Jay, Gloria and Manny are attending a wedding in Mexico - but all of their respective trips are thrown into turmoil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay tries to make a good impression on his new neighbours, while Cam and Mitchell attempt to teach Lily a message of acceptance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane is on the cards when Homer finds an old film strip, leading to family flashbacks telling the story of Bart and Lisa's troublesome toddler years - and how they got into their first fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family hears about Grampa's time in the Air Force, and when Milhouse's Dutch cousin Annika pops by, Bart takes up smoking to impress her. Featuring the guest voice of Game of Thrones' Carice van Houten

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a modernised Springfield Elementary School has a technical meltdown, Lisa does her best to transform it into a different institution. During the process, Groundskeeper Willie coaches her and the other members of the Mathlympics team for an important maths quiz against their Waverly Hill rivals

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall, Naked and Afraid, BBC News and ITV News. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Wild Isles, Starstruck, The Apprentice, MILF Manor, The Piano and Married at First Sight Australia. They also share their thoughts on an unusual edition Match of the Day, and an ITV News report on Gary Lineker. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Tommy, who decided a wedding on water skis was the way forward, given his bride Hannah's champion experience in the sport

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Boat-dwelling Steven kicks off the competition in East Anglia, accompanied by his partner of 10 years, Lisa, with a Sunday lunch-inspired roast dinner with a fresh fish starter. Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil goes into nesting mode after finding some abandoned duck eggs, while Mitchell worries about Cam's friendship with a group of frat boys. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire takes Haley and Alex into the office for Bring your Daughter to Work Day, while Phil joins Luke and Manny's class for a community service day that offers more lessons than expected. Meanwhile, Gloria is delighted to learn she has been chosen for jury duty, while Cam and Mitchell are in need of a mediator when they start bickering over who to invite to their party

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: There's a death in Springfield, while Krusty's confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homer's safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge signs Homer and Bart up on a father-son bonding ocean voyage in a bid to heal their troubled relationship, and while the pair are away takes over Homer's fantasy football league. Animation, featuring the voice of Nick Offerman (Parks and Recreation)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts go head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is to run for senior class president against Manny. Phil insists on introducing Haley to marketing guru Merv Schechter (guest star Martin Short), while Cam makes a rash decision when he finds out his star football player is moving away

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is unable to hide his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate segment for the local news and the day gets even better after meeting his weatherman hero Rainer Shine (guest star Nathan Fillion). Meanwhile, Jay decides to infuse a little grit into Manny's video interview for his college application, and Lily decides to take matters into her own hands over her new house guest

programme.sub-title: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook

programme.desc: Fellow chef Paul Rankin gives James a personal tour of Northern Ireland's capital city - his home town of Belfast - before the duo enjoy a spot of golf. programme.title: The Killer Beside Me

programme.desc: In 2006, Angela Ferguson told police her husband left during an argument and hadn't been seen since. When his body was found in a car boot, it triggered the hunt for his murderer

programme.title: Drive (2011)
programme.desc: A stuntman who moonlights as a getaway driver tries to protect the wife and child of an imprisoned criminal. Upon his release, the convict is forced to rob a pawnshop to pay off his gangland debts, with the driver offering his assistance. However, the job goes awry and the driver is drawn into a conflict with the Mafia. Crime drama, with Ryan Gosling, Carey Mulligan and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Robin Hood: The Rebellion (2018)
programme.desc: With his true love captured by the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham, the legendary Robin Hood and his crew of outlaws execute a daring rescue to save her. Action adventure, starring Ben Freeman, Brian Blessed, Martyn Ford and Kristian Nairn

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rangers go undercover in an attempt to stop a group of gangsters unlawfully taking ownership of a nightclub. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy poses as a high-class fashion model to catch the killer responsible for murdering two catwalk queens. Heather Locklear and William Shatner star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Kuroda asks Steve to join a search for a mysterious youth reported to be living with wolves. Sci-fi drama, starring Lee Majors

programme.title: Sinbad and the War of the Furies (2016)
programme.desc: On a treasure hunt gone wrong, modern-day adventurer Sinbad accidentally releases the Furies, three beautiful but terrible ancient beings powerful enough to threaten life on Earth. Action adventure, starring John Hennigan, Jamie Bernadette and Ashley Doris

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: September Gun (1983)
programme.desc: Ageing gunfighter Robert Preston is hired to help a dedicated nun reclaim her mission from the outlaws who have taken it over. However, gang leader Christopher Lloyd gives the unlikely pair plenty of problems. Likeable, old-fashioned Western, also starring Patty Duke and Geoffrey Lewis

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew members visit the planet Sigma Iotia II to investigate the disappearance of a Federation starship, and find they have to integrate themselves into a society that mirrors the 1920s gangster era. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve and a female pilot take to the air to investigate a plot to kill a prince. Erik Estrada guest stars

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles (2011)
programme.desc: The Earth is bombarded by what appear to be meteors, but turn out to be the vanguard of an alien invasion force. As America's west coast comes under heavy attack, a platoon of soldiers is sent in to fight off the aliens and rescue civilians - but the troops have only a few hours to complete their mission before the area is bombed. Sci-fi thriller, with Aaron Eckhart and Ramon Rodriguez

programme.title: Impostor (2002)
programme.desc: A weapons designer comes up with a device to give humanity the edge in their battle against marauding aliens - only to be suspected of being an extraterrestrial android sent to lull the Earthmen into a false sense of security. Sci-fi drama, based on Philip K Dick's short story, starring Gary Sinise, Madeleine Stowe and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Double Team (1997)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is sent to a top-secret installation after a mission goes wrong, and is told he can never leave. When he realises his pregnant wife is in danger from a terrorist, he escapes and teams up with a flamboyant arms dealer to protect her. Action adventure, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dennis Rodman and Mickey Rourke

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Game (2022)
programme.desc: A father and son are shipwrecked on a remote island where they are caught up in a trophy hunt held by its mysterious owner, a merciless man who uses the land as an elite hunting preserve for stalking the most dangerous game of all: human. Remake of the 1932 film of the same name. Thriller, starring Chris Tamburello, Casper Van Dien and Judd Nelson.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The crusading cop gets on the trail of a serial strangler who is targeting homeless women. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: Polar Storm (2009)
programme.desc: A comet collides with Earth, causing a devastating series of quakes, floods and volcanic eruptions. However, when the dust has settled, it turns out worse is to come. The impact has pushed the planet off its axis, and if a team of scientists cannot put it right, the crust will shift, wiping out all life. Disaster thriller, starring Jack Coleman, Holly Dignard and Tyler Johnston

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: When Worlds Collide (1951)
programme.desc: Scientists discover the Earth is about to be destroyed in a cosmic disaster and race against time to construct a rocket that will transport them to a new planet. Sci-fi epic which won an Oscar for its special effects, starring Richard Derr, Barbara Rush and Larry Keating

programme.title: The Arrival (1996)
programme.desc: A radio astronomer discovers a signal transmitting to Earth and resolves to discover its source. Travelling to Mexico, he unwittingly uncovers an alien conspiracy to take over the planet and finds his own life in danger. Sci-fi thriller, starring Charlie Sheen, Ron Silver, Lindsay Crouse and Teri Polo

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew investigates the mysterious death of an entire star system, and it falls to Spock to make the ultimate sacrifice once they discover the cause of the problem. Sci-fi drama, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve embarks on another daring mission when a government plane becomes the target for an attack by a stolen missile

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: The Narns launch an unprovoked attack on a peaceful Centauri colony, and raiders target transport ships near the station

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The ranger investigates when a lawyer preparing to file a police brutality lawsuit is found dead. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: The Client (1994)
programme.desc: A Mafia lawyer tells a boy where a politician's body is buried shortly before committing suicide, prompting a team of district attorneys to press the young witness for information. However, the streetwise kid refuses to give evidence unless his own and his family's safety is guaranteed, and hires a lawyer to ensure his demands are met. Courtroom thriller based on the novel by John Grisham, with Susan Sarandon, Tommy Lee Jones and Brad Renfro.

programme.title: Kiss of Death (1995)
programme.desc: A jailbird is persuaded to help the police lay their hands on a psychotic mobster, as a means of exacting revenge for the betrayal which landed him behind bars in the first place. However, he is soon troubled by his conscience, leaving him facing a dilemma as he is drawn ever deeper into treachery. Remake of the 1947 thriller, starring David Caruso, Nicolas Cage, Samuel L Jackson, Helen Hunt, Ving Rhames and Stanley Tucci

programme.title: Dragon Blade (2015)
programme.desc: A corrupt Roman ruler leads a vast army to seize control of the Asian trade routes. The leader of a band of Chinese warriors vows to defend his homeland from them, aided by a Roman general who has turned his back on the empire. Together, they assemble an army from 36 nations to repel the invading army. Historical action adventure, starring Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrien Brody. In Mandarin and English

programme.title: The Blood on Satan's Claw (1971)
programme.desc: Strange remains are discovered in a 17th-century farming village, and have a disturbing effect on the townsfolk. They form a sinister cult, performing strange and violent rituals to bring their demonic master back to life. However, a pious judge is prepared to use brutal methods of his own to root out the evil. Horror, starring Patrick Wymark, Linda Hayden and Simon Williams

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics in Birmingham try to stop hypothermia from setting in when a woman collapses in the snow. At the same time, Mark and Adi attend to a woman whose waters may have broken at 27 weeks and could be hours away from giving birth. In Coventry, crewmates Neil and Laura treat an elderly man who has a life-threatening infection

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Emma fears for a cyclist who has been trapped under a tram for 15 minutes after a car clipped her wheel and launched her over the handlebars of her bike. A 21-year-old man with a history of sinus issues is bleeding profusely from his nose and the back of his throat, and doctors David and Michael treat a 34-year-old motorbike rider with a badly smashed-up knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The story of 22-year-old police officer Hazel, who is rushed to St George's after crashing her motorbike while out on a ride with her father. Meanwhile, 86-year-old John is admitted to A&E with a suspected 'triple A' - a ruptured aortic aneurysm in his abdomen, a condition that can be fatal. The doctors must work quickly to diagnose the cause of the internal bleeding, but their investigations reveal further complications. John's children share the story of their father's life, and his surprising secret that sent shockwaves through the family

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: After the detectives' hard work, a person visits the home of a relative she didn't know existed, and who surprisingly lives just 10 minutes' from her own house. On another case, the hunters experience a strange sense of déjà vu when they trace heirs to the estate of a woman they have met before, and their search uncovers the remarkable history of Thames bargemen. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates are divulged

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The lads head to Birmingham, where they fall out over a bench that Henry thinks has value

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couple's afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following morning's feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years' experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House B&B in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. She takes her guests to a local brewery and an upmarket restaurant, where everyone seems to enjoy themselves, but the revelation that a ghost may roam the rooms of the B&B leaves some of the participants nervous

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Liverpool, where the first to host is 41-year-old taxi business owner Rob, who plans a Scouse-themed evening. The guests he is hoping to impress are 23-year-old fitness fanatic Toria, 44-year-old property developer Christine, 40-year-old South African business woman Sam, and 20-year-old student Inzy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Liverpool, businesswoman Sam, plans a South African-themed evening. However, her food is a bit hit-and-miss on a night full of poor pronunciation, fashion faux pas and a bit of mischief over the main

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gym worker Toria hosts the third party in Liverpool, and hopes a kissing game around the dinner table, along with her flaky flapjacks, will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Undergraduate Inzy is the fourth host in Liverpool, and he is on a mission to prove students really can cook. The flirting between him and Toria continues, but will he allow love to stand in way of the competition?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, property developer Christine plans to wow her guests with a Spanish holiday-themed dinner party. However, the mood is rather more feisty than fiesta as on-going tensions finally come to a head and it's not long before the honesty - and the sparks - begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at the Golden Fleece in Ruleholme, Cumbria, run by chef Robert Cowan and his partner, Sylvia Spark. Before long, guests Eileen and Emmanuel pick up on cleanliness issues, and breakfast proves to be a disappointment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Bubble Inn in Stenson, Derbyshire for the third day of the competition, where unsightly stains and security leave some of them less than impressed. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Melinda Beckett-Hughes is the final host of the week at Ayuda House in Greater Manchester - and as she has spent the week picking fault, the guests expect perfection from her. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

A 78-year-old man is rushed into A&E after falling down the stairs, and doctors fear he may have a bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save a grandmother with severe osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her four-month-old grandson. In Stratford, paramedics Mandy Morrice and Michelle Godwin treat a racegoer on a night out who collapsed in the street and suffered a serious head wound. In Warwick, a concerned member of the public calls emergency services to a suspected cardiac arrest but ends up becoming the patient himself. Plus, Neil Vann and Laura Perkins give life-saving treatment to an elderly man found unconscious face down in his hallway

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. Katie, who is 13-weeks pregnant, calls for help when she keeps having seizures and the Essex and Herts Air Ambulance crew help Jo who has been lying on the bathroom floor with a broken ankle for nine hours

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team take a deep dive into the nation's favourite supermarket aisles. In this first episode, the team chill out in the freezer aisle. Jimmy Doherty investigates why there's more to frozen chips than just potatoes, Helen Lawal learns why frozen ready meals have best-before dates, Briony May Williams gets the inside scoop on soft-scoop ice cream, and Andi Oliver learns how to get the most out of your freezer at home

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The researchers investigate the life and work of a Glaswegian author who had lost all contact with his family, and take a trip to the home of a newspaper man from Norwich and uncover a previously unknown pension pay out of £30,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Staffordshire to meet petrolhead Martin, who's also the organiser of a local music festival

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex. The guests worry about uncomfortable sleeping arrangements, the price of accommodation and the strict 9pm curfew - and the prospect of a dance-style workout only exacerbates their bad mood

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William Cheeseman, owners of five-star Gold-rated 38 St Giles in Norwich, try to impress their competitors. Unfortunately, poor breakfast presentation and complaints about noise from the street increase the tension between the couple as they strive for perfection

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ann and Bill Clay play host at their four-star Bosvean House B&B in Bude, Cornwall. Diane and Max Seivewright query the establishment's luxury description, while Galia Grainger complains about the lack of a sea view. However, the hosts hope an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a stick dance and a drink in their garden shed will succeed in winning over the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Village bakers Diane and Max Seivewright, the owners of Ombersley B&B in Worcestershire, host the last round of the competition, but some guests are far from impressed with the rooms and food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners gather to find out who has won the competition. Diane and Max Seivewright, the hosts at Ombersley B&B, feel betrayed by Ann and Bill Clay's feedback and want to know why they have been so harshly criticised, while Galia Grainger asks why Slimmeria's rules and regulations have provoked so much hostility

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in Bournemouth, 38-year-old bar manager and musician Adie, hopes to hit the right notes by ensuring his night of laid back fun is full of music and laughter. With trumpets and drums at the ready and tricky crustaceans proving hard to crack, does Adie have what it takes to win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second Bournemouth host is aristocratic vet Sir Henry, who plans to charm his way to the prize by hosting an evening of relaxed dining

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Pippa from Bournemouth hopes to impress her guests by throwing a dinner party with every course inspired by fish

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, spiritual student Simone hopes to wow her guests with a spicy Bajan menu. She's keen to impress her new friend, posh vet Sir Henry, but she's unsure about Pippa, who doesn't hold back as she probes Simone about her student house

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Bournemouth, flamboyant charity manager Jacqueline hopes that Michelin star-style food will win her the prize. With partridge and black pudding scotch eggs, this could be a culinary night to remember, but will Sir Henry and Simone steal her thunder with an unlikely romance?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at St Hilary Guest House in Llandudno, north Wales, where owner Tricia Watson and her daughter Jess hope that their classic seaside destination will impress. Guests Darren and Alex take a shine to their sink, but Debbie and Paul aren't pleased with the plumbing. At dinner, there's food for thought when some of the guests' culinary expertise is revealed, leaving the hosts in the hot seat. And there's a surprising revelation from Sue and Linda. At breakfast, cooking methods and quality are questioned, before a refusal to return has Tricia and Jess chewing over their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second of this week's destinations is The Falcon Retreat in south Wales, run by Sue Burston and her right-hand woman Linda Roberts. When the guests arrive at the secluded location, Darren and Alex are wowed by the view, but there are some issues in their room. At dinner, the guests are surprised by their hosts' previous professions, and a conversation about the additional charge for breakfast worries Sue and Linda

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Crown Inn in Grewelthorpe, North Yorkshire, where owners Debbie Heartfield and Paul Dixon hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final venue is Stix Glamping in Greetham, Rutland, where one guest decides glamping is not for her before she has even set foot on site, leaving her partner all alone

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees the B&Bers take each other to task on everything from insufficient slumber to hopeless hosting, before the payments are revealed and we find out who's won

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches for a family home around Hove on the south coast of England for Duncan, Anna and their three children, as they return from seven years living in Switzerland. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer helps couple Mick and Bernie look for a property to downsize to when they retire in the South Downs

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the penultimate episode of the series, and the last chance for players to secure a place in the grand final. Who has the best pop knowledge and will go through?

programme.title: Ancient Greece by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: On the island of Paros, in the middle of the Aegean Sea, Alice joins an archaeologist on a tour of the ancient sites he has discovered in 38 years of digging. Alice takes a boat to the island of Delos where the Temple of Apollo once stood, and leaves Greece behind to go to Türkiye, where Ancient Greece was once the prevalent culture

programme.title: Castle Secrets
programme.sub-title: The Secret Escape; Tower of Torture; A King's Untamed Lust
programme.desc: A look at the fortress where a knight was trapped, while his nemesis lay patiently waiting. This edition also explores a sprawling fortress, which was the site of a dynasty's gruesome and inventive form of punishment. Plus, examining a king's palace, which was home to the shady secrets of all his marital failures

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 63-year-old builder falls from a great height while working on a construction site, and his daughter shares her stories of the sacrifices he made for her. Doctors fear a teenager who has been hit by a car may have sustained brain injuries, while a man who collapsed while playing golf talks about his unconventional upbringing in Kenya and how he had to adapt to fulfill his dreams

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager with anorexia nervosa is rushed into the paediatrics emergency department with dangerously low blood pressure. Her mother reflects on her daughter's lifelong struggle with her eating disorder, and the pain she feels at being unable to protect her child. A 66-year-old man who fell from a great height onto a concrete surface is brought in to St George's, and doctors fear he has sustained organ damage and internal bleeding. His daughter talks about their close relationship and the sacrifices her father has made over the years

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save a grandmother with severe osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her four-month-old grandson. In Stratford, paramedics Mandy Morrice and Michelle Godwin treat a racegoer on a night out who collapsed in the street and suffered a serious head wound. In Warwick, a concerned member of the public calls emergency services to a suspected cardiac arrest but ends up becoming the patient himself. Plus, Neil Vann and Laura Perkins give life-saving treatment to an elderly man found unconscious face down in his hallway

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team take their trolleys down the fruit and veg aisle. Kate Quilton is in Kenya to see how summer vegetables get to British supermarkets in the thick of winter. Jimmy Doherty looks at the measures taken to transport bananas across the UK, John Whaite finds out why supermarket blackberries are so big, Helen Lawal investigates a robot berry-picker in Portugal, and Matt Tebbutt finds out how we can waste less fruit and veg

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. Katie, who is 13-weeks pregnant, calls for help when she keeps having seizures and the Essex and Herts Air Ambulance crew help Jo who has been lying on the bathroom floor with a broken ankle for nine hours

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The story of 22-year-old police officer Hazel, who is rushed to St George's after crashing her motorbike while out on a ride with her father. Meanwhile, 86-year-old John is admitted to A&E with a suspected 'triple A' - a ruptured aortic aneurysm in his abdomen, a condition that can be fatal. The doctors must work quickly to diagnose the cause of the internal bleeding, but their investigations reveal further complications. John's children share the story of their father's life, and his surprising secret that sent shockwaves through the family

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: After the detectives' hard work, a person visits the home of a relative she didn't know existed, and who surprisingly lives just 10 minutes' from her own house. On another case, the hunters experience a strange sense of déjà vu when they trace heirs to the estate of a woman they have met before, and their search uncovers the remarkable history of Thames bargemen. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates are divulged

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The lads head to Birmingham, where they fall out over a bench that Henry thinks has value

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couple's afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following morning's feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years' experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House B&B in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save a grandmother with severe osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her four-month-old grandson. In Stratford, paramedics Mandy Morrice and Michelle Godwin treat a racegoer on a night out who collapsed in the street and suffered a serious head wound. In Warwick, a concerned member of the public calls emergency services to a suspected cardiac arrest but ends up becoming the patient himself. Plus, Neil Vann and Laura Perkins give life-saving treatment to an elderly man found unconscious face down in his hallway

programme.title: Plunderer: The Life and Times of a Nazi Art Thief
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jonathan Petropoulos investigates the life of former Nazi art dealer Bruno Lohse, who became Hermann Göring's personal collector, tasked with finding desirable works of art. After the Second World War, Lohse spent a brief time in prison but later resumed his career as a dealer, often trading in art looted during the conflict

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets off from Mallaig to explore a group of islands famous for their unusual names - Rum, Muck and Eigg. Along the way, he meets the real 'Lord Muck', visits the dramatic Kinloch Castle and joins the residents of Eigg as they celebrate their community buyout

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn relive the golden age of steam. They begin by exploring how the introduction of steam railways in the early 19th century created a domestic revolution, from the way people lived to the food they ate. Arriving at Ffestiniog Railway in Snowdonia, they find out how millions of tons of slate were moved down the mountain, while underground, Alex experiences the brutal conditions face by miners in the Llechwedd Quarry

programme.title: Battlefield America
programme.desc: Charting the pivotal battles of the American Civil War, underscoring their impact on the broader conflict and on American history. Beginning by examining the strategic decision made by Union and Confederate leaders and the intense combat experienced by soldiers at the battles of Shiloh and Antietam. Part one of three

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag
programme.desc: German women may be perceived as passive witnesses to the horrific crimes committed by the Nazi regime. However, as this documentary reveals many were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. The first of two episodes begins with Hitler's arrival in power in 1933 and goes back to the roots of the indoctrination of young German girls within the female branch of the Hitler Youth (BDM)

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag
programme.desc: Part two of two. The German women who were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. In 1942, a new phase of the genocide took place - the 'Final Solution'. Man women, far from being mere witnesses or accomplices, played a role as important as it was deadly

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands

programme.title: Plunderer: The Life and Times of a Nazi Art Thief
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jonathan Petropoulos investigates Nazi art dealer Bruno Lohse's life in post-war America. Dealing in looted art, he became an invisible hand, even as the original owners' families sought the return of works rightfully theirs. Featuring an archive interviews with Lohse himself, as well as curators, investigators and descendants of the victims of Nazi art theft

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
