programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn continue to relive the golden age of steam and how the Victorian railways created modern Britain. They visit Beamish in County Durham, learning how the rail companies first realised there was money to be made in moving people rather than commodities. Then Peter and Alex live the life of navvies, the men who built the thousands of miles of tracks in all weather conditions, and Ruth finds out what impact the new railroads had on the cottage industries. She also learns about the role of the guard, and the trio learn what precautions were necessary for taking a long journey on a train that was yet to include the necessary facilities

programme.title: Battlefield America
programme.desc: Highlighting the strategic decisions of Ulysses S. Grant and Robert E. Lee and the intense combat that defined the crucial battles of Vicksburg and Gettysburg, underscoring their impact on the broader conflict and American history. Part two of three

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery
programme.desc: Part one of two. The summer of 1944 marked the end of dark times for France. Aspiring to a better future, its people rolled up their sleeves and set out about rebuilding the nation's industry and agriculture. However, in post Second World War France, hopes and reality soon collided

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery
programme.desc: Part two of two. From the Liberation of Paris to the Évian Accords signing Algeria's independence, via major social crisis of 1947, Abbé Pierre's appeal against poverty, the rise of modern comfort or the OAS attacks, this documentary paints a vast picture of a country torn between unity and division in the wake of the Second World War

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island-hopping odyssey, setting sail on an island pilgrimage in the footsteps of saints, visiting Lismore, Colonsay and Oronsay. He hears the story of Saint Moluag, who established a monastery on Lismore, joins writer Alexander McCall Smith on his yacht, and uncovers the secrets revealed by a Viking ship burial on Colonsay

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Businessman Adam and his father Ian, who live in a four-bedroom mansion in Essex, swap with single mum Kiptieu, who lives in a small council flat in Abbey Wood, London. With a number of successful businesses under his belt, Adam now travels round the world, interviewing the great and the good from showbusiness, sport and business, including the likes of John Travolta, 50 Cent and Floyd Mayweather, sharing their stories of success with clients who are willing to pay Adam thousands for the inside track. Kiptieu fled war-torn Sierra Leone and is a widow bringing up her three daughters in a two-bedroom ground-floor flat. Kiptieu also recently lost her job because of the Covid-19 pandemic, so the family budget is tighter than ever

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anna Maxwell Martin researches her family tree. Travelling to the small town in Northern Ireland where her father grew up, her understanding of her grandparents - who suffered a heartbreaking family tragedy - is turned on its head. On her mother's side, Anna starts with her grandfather Maxwell, whose name she added to her own to create her stage name. Looking into his childhood, she uncovers a dark history of domestic abuse and family separation. However, she also discovers extraordinary familial solidarity and love that changed the pattern for the generations that followed

programme.title: Duffy's Pub
programme.desc: US actor Patrick Duffy, a third-generation Irishman, has always been fascinated by the communities that develop around their local pub, so he travels to Ireland to see for himself how bars have evolved and changed. Along with his partner, the actress Linda Purl, Patrick visits many Duffy's Pubs and other legendary boozers across Dublin, Galway, Donegal, Mayo and Tipperary, to explore pub culture and the changes it has undergone over the years. He ends his journey in his ancestral home of Kilmovee, Mayo, where his grandfather, also Patrick, lived before leaving for a new life in Montana

programme.title: Uncharted with Ray Goggins

Father and son will attempt to summit one of Africa's highest and least climbed peaks in the Rwenzori Mountains alongside Ray Goggins. It's a long and gruelling ascent of seven days through knee deep bog and alpine rock to its glacier peak, making it one of the continents toughest expeditions

The other is a retired Tipperary man, who devotes much of his time to maintaining his local cemetery in Cloughprior in a rural part of North Tipperary. Richard Downes presents

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: George spars in the boxing gym but things take a turn, Ian struggles with recent events, and Denise is urged to start treatment

programme.title: Mark Moriarty: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Mark celebrates beef in all its glory, meeting the farmers raising the herds and digging into what makes great beef worth the investment. He cooks beef rigatoni, fillet steak 'au poivre' with shoestring fries, and ossobucco milanese

programme.title: BackStory
programme.desc: Following four Irish young people, whose parents are immigrants to Ireland, as they travel back to their parents' ancestral homeland. In this edition, 30-year-old singer-songwriter Siobhan McClean and her mother Tambu visit Zimbabwe

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine O'Clock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Duffy's Pub
programme.desc: US actor Patrick Duffy, a third-generation Irishman, has always been fascinated by the communities that develop around their local pub, so he travels to Ireland to see for himself how bars have evolved and changed. Along with his partner, the actress Linda Purl, Patrick visits many Duffy's Pubs and other legendary boozers across Dublin, Galway, Donegal, Mayo and Tipperary, to explore pub culture and the changes it has undergone over the years. He ends his journey in his ancestral home of Kilmovee, Mayo, where his grandfather, also Patrick, lived before leaving for a new life in Montana

programme.title: Uncharted with Ray Goggins
programme.desc: Singer Keith Duffy is venturing to Uganda with his actor son Jay for the test of a lifetime. Father and son will attempt to summit one of Africa's highest and least climbed peaks in the Rwenzori Mountains alongside Ray Goggins. It's a long and gruelling ascent of seven days through knee deep bog and alpine rock to its glacier peak, making it one of the continents toughest expeditions

programme.title: Joan
programme.desc: Boisie and Joan buy an engagement ring while the police search for the missing Stubbs painting at Boisie's store, but find nothing and Joan is adamant that they have to get rid of the artwork and go straight. As the law closes in, Boisie struggles to find a buyer for the painting and turns to Albie for help, while Joan is dreaming of her own business.

programme.title: Clean Sweep
programme.desc: Shelly faces mounting pressure after being identified as the mysterious woman at the crime scene. She contemplates escape, but her love for her children prevails and she decides to stay put. Crime thriller, starring Charlene McKenna

programme.desc: Part two of two. Eoin Warner heads inland on the second stage of his wild journey and finds one of the last remaining pockets of Atlantic Rainforest in Conamara - Derryclare woods. The woods are home to pine martens, red squirrels, and the newly arrived woodpecker. Crossing vast boglands, Eoin goes in search of lost birds, before heading to the highest of the 12 Bens, Binn Bhán

programme.title: Dolphins: Wonders of the Ocean
programme.desc: Part two of two. Ken O'Sullivan travels west of Kerry and finds new dolphin species in clear blue water. Over the years of ocean exploration, he works out where the fertile areas of the ocean are, and his journeys bring him into contact with some of the largest creatures ever to have lived. The story takes a dark turn as Ken discovers thousands of dolphins are being killed every year in the Northeast Atlantic, many of them in Irish waters

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The revival sitcom spin-off from Cheers welcomes back uptight radio psychiatrist Frasier Crane (Kelsey Grammer) to Boston for 10 more episodes of familial strife with his son Freddy (Jack Cutmore-Scott) and nephew David (Anders Keith). During the second season, Frasier returns to his old stomping ground at KACL radio station in Seattle. He is reunited with Bob 'Bulldog Briscoe (Dan Butler), Gil Chesterton (Edward Hibbert) and his ferocious agent, Bebe Glazer (Harriet Sansom Harris)

programme.desc: France v Republic of Ireland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Marie Crowe presents coverage of both teams' concluding Group A2 match, held at Stade des Alpes in Grenoble. Captain Katie McCabe gave the Republic a shock lead in March's reverse fixture in Dublin, but a brace by Melvine Malard gave France a 2-1 win and they will be favourites to prevail once again, even though Carla Ward's side have acquitted themselves well throughout the campaign. With analysis from Karen Duggan and Louise Quinn

They escape and are picked up by a boat heading to France, where they try to build a new life, but it is not long before they are trying to sneak back into the USA as illegal immigrants

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: FIFA Women's World Cup Qualifier
programme.desc: France v Republic of Ireland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Marie Crowe presents coverage of both teams' concluding Group A2 match, held at Stade des Alpes in Grenoble. Captain Katie McCabe gave the Republic a shock lead in March's reverse fixture in Dublin, but a brace by Melvine Malard gave France a 2-1 win and they will be favourites to prevail once again, even though Carla Ward's side have acquitted themselves well throughout the campaign. With analysis from Karen Duggan and Louise Quinn

At the heart of the film is Wicklow mum Jenny, who is fighting tirelessly to secure treatment for her 16-year-old son Josh, who is consistently losing weight as he battles the devastating grip of anorexia. Others featured are 42-year-old father of four Sean, who has battled anorexia for over a decade, and 36-year-old Amanda, who lives with the debilitating daily reality of anorexia

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A man is discovered to have been buried alive, leaving Pembleton and Bayliss investigating a murder. Meanwhile, Munch and Kellerman examine a horrific car crash that was apparently no accident. Richard Belzer stars

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Kip and his friends watch on TV as Scott discusses his public coming out while accepting the MVP award. Shane drives to his cottage with Ilya, who shares the trauma of his mother's death by suicide

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: A medical emergency forces Sabi to go to the ER, Wolf cracks when pressured to reveal secrets to Raffo and Aqsa has an emergency of her own

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Teenager Logan starts work as an apprentice deck-hand, while landlady Pat recalls fond memories from her life in Brixham

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyone's a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddon's plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixham's Crab Festival

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange (1971)
programme.desc: Sadistic young gang leader Alex leads a carefree life indulging his love of rape, violence and classical music. When he is finally arrested, he is subjected to a sinister form of aversion therapy that brainwashes him into being physically unable to use violence. However, on his release, he finds friends and family have turned on him, while others seek to exploit him to further their political ends. Drama, starring Malcolm McDowell and Warren Clarke

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers' version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennell's Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friend's wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental car's GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Mulholland Drive (2001)
programme.desc: An actress arrives home to find a mysterious woman in her room who is suffering from amnesia. She sets out with the stranger to discover how she got there - but the trail quickly leads to intrigue, blackmail and murder. David Lynch's mystery, starring Naomi Watts, Justin Theroux, Laura Harring and Robert Forster

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Miller's action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Ferrari (2023)
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, ex-racecar driver Enzo Ferrari is in crisis. Bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife, Laura, built from nothing a decade earlier. Their tempestuous marriage struggles with the mourning for one son and the acknowledgement of another. Attempting to secure their survival, he rolls the dice on one race - 1,000 miles across Italy, the iconic Mille Miglia. Director Michael Mann's drama, starring Adam Driver and Jack O'Connell

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friend's wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumet's fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket (1987)
programme.desc: Raw recruits undergo harsh training under a domineering Marine drill sergeant after being called up for service in the Vietnam War, but his brutal methods lead to the breakdown of one of his cadets. Eventually, some of the fully trained soldiers get their first taste of combat in 1968. Stanley Kubrick's drama, starring Matthew Modine, Adam Baldwin, Vincent D'Onofrio and R Lee Ermey

programme.title: The Shining (1980)
programme.desc: A writer takes a caretaking job at a remote mountain hotel. It has closed for the winter, and he has been hired to get the place ready for the next season. But evil spirits haunting its corridors destroy his sanity, causing the unhinged author to rampage through the hotel and terrorise his wife and young son. Stanley Kubrick's horror, based on the Stephen King novel, with Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd and Scatman Crothers

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange (1971)
programme.desc: Sadistic young gang leader Alex leads a carefree life indulging his love of rape, violence and classical music. When he is finally arrested, he is subjected to a sinister form of aversion therapy that brainwashes him into being physically unable to use violence. However, on his release, he finds friends and family have turned on him, while others seek to exploit him to further their political ends. Drama, starring Malcolm McDowell and Warren Clarke

programme.title: Mad Max 2 (1981)
programme.desc: A former cop haunted by his tragic past roams the wasteland of Australia in the aftermath of a nuclear war. He arrives at a besieged settlement and grudgingly helps protect the residents from a horde of marauding bikers who want to get hold of their valuable supply of petrol. Futuristic adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Bruce Spence, Vernon Wells, Emil Minty and Kjell Nilsson

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor

programme.title: Detroit (2017)
programme.desc: A group of rogue police officers responds to a complaint with apparent retribution rather than justice in mind, launching a raid on a group of African-Americans. Public anger reaches a peak after the incident, as relationships sour with authority. Fact-based drama set during the 1967 Detroit riots, starring John Boyega, Anthony Mackie and Algee Smith

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: Cameron Cade is predicted to be the next great quarterback of American football. During a night-time training session, he suffers a traumatic brain injury. Cameron agrees to attend a week-long boot camp run by retiring star quarterback Isaiah White at his secluded desert compound. However, Cade's life soon turns into a nightmare. Supernatural horror, starring Marlon Wayans and Tyriq Withers

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition is about the race against time. From a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

programme.title: The Plague (2025)
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Thriller, starring Joel Edgerton and Everett Blunck

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Sisu: Road To Revenge (2025)
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Finland reluctantly cedes territory to the invading Red Army. Former Army commando Aatami Korpi is among the affected and returns to his family plot to deconstruct his timber-framed home and relocate the wooden beams on a truck across the new border separating the Soviet Union and Finland. The legend of the 'the man who refuses to die' remains a thorn in the side of the Soviet army, and a nameless KGB officer agrees to liberate high-ranking brute Igor Draganov from a Siberian prison in exchange for killing Aatami. Finnish action sequel, starring Jorma Tommila, Stephen Lang and Richard Brake

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores archaeological digs at sites dating back to the Viking age, offering an insight into how the seafaring warriors from Scandinavia lived across Britain. In the Outer Hebrides, she examines signs of the earliest Norse settlers, before inspecting a collection of silver and gold pieces discovered in York. There is also a look at some of the most treasured Viking finds, including 12th-century ivory chess figures the Lewis Chessmen

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to discover what life was like during the Bronze and Iron ages before the Romans invaded. In Norfolk, she helps to uncover a prehistoric monument that has been hidden for 2,000 years, and examines the Hebridean skeletons known as the Cladh Hallan Mummies, learning each is made up of parts from different people

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to learn more about mankind's Stone Age ancestors, and travels to Jersey to meet a team hoping to shed new light on the Neanderthals. In the Preseli Hills in Pembrokeshire, she learns about an investigation into the mystery surrounding Stonehenge, and hears stories of cannibalism and the ritual use of human skulls during the Ice Age

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the east of England. The presenters visit Norwich Castle Museum, where they find out about developments at Must Farm in Cambridgeshire, a hunt for Roman treasure in Colchester, a burial site at Abington, an Anglo-Saxon royal hall at Lyminge, the 16th-century Tudor Basing House, and a dig involving Emperor Nero at Silchester

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit the Dorset Country Museum, where they explore finds from archaeological digs across the west of Britain. The presenters examine objects found at a Bronze Age burial site in Barrowclump, a Roman army site called Durotriges and the site of an early hospital at Winchester, Hampshire. Plus, a hoard found by metal detectors revealing hidden secrets of childhood 1,000 years ago, and a Roman settlement at Ipplepen in Devon

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: A look at the silent threat of submarines, from tests in the River Thames, to the German's deadly U-boat attacks in the Second World War

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the unsolved murder of Crimewatch presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot dead outside her house in Fulham, west London, in April 1999. Intense media coverage followed and several lines of enquiry were pursued, including a theory that she had been killed by a jealous ex-boyfriend and the idea that somebody had hired a hitman in revenge for a conviction linked to Crimewatch. Following a trial at the Old Bailey, 40-year-old Barry George was found guilty of Dando's murder, but a third appeal quashed his original conviction and resulted in his acquittal in 2009

programme.desc: How the vast and fragile infrastructure hidden underground - from subways and pipelines to one of the big coal seams in the United States - would unravel if humanity vanished

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Happisburgh in Norfolk, where the discovery of rare artefacts provides evidence of the earliest human occupation in Britain, challenging the conventional belief that mankind would not have been able to survive in northern Europe one million years ago. She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts travels to Bamburgh, Northumberland, to learn about the generations of Anglo Saxons who lived and worked there, gaining an insight into the illnesses they suffered and the societies in which they lived. She visits the Sutton Hoo site, as well as a pioneering project in Sittingbourne, Kent, which was set up following the unearthing of an Anglo Saxon cemetery, and looks at the Staffordshire hoard discovered by a metal detector in 2009

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother enjoying a walk in the Kent countryside were the victims of a frenzied hammer attack by Michael Stone, who left them for dead. Lin Russell and her six-year-old daughter Megan died from their injuries, but nine-year-old Josie survived and made a remarkable recovery. This film examines the events surrounding the murders and features interviews with Shaun Russell - Lin's widower and the girls' father - Josie's close friend Lucy Gregson, her former primary school teacher Lynda Roberts and police family liaison officer Pauline Smith

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of the key turning point of the Second World War, which started on June 6, 1944. A titanic fleet took on the beaches of Normandy, intent on liberating Europe from Hitler's Nazis. Thanks to the lessons learned from the Dieppe raid of August 1942 and supported by the Provence landing of August 1944, the mission was a spectacular success as the Allies succeeded in moving beyond their political differences, overcoming logistical difficulties and carrying out an operation with unprecedented military stakes

Thanks to the lessons learned from the Dieppe raid of August 1942 and supported by the Provence landing of August 1944, the mission was a spectacular success as the Allies succeeded in moving beyond their political differences, overcoming logistical difficulties and carrying out an operation with unprecedented military stakes

programme.title: D-Day: 100 Days to Beat the Third Reich
programme.desc: An examination of the 100 days it took for the Allies to liberate Normandy, to break through the German line and to pave the way towards victory. It was a period that made history, both heroic and tragic. The first of two programmes retraces events, day by day, from D-Day up to the Liberation of Paris, through a series of moving testimonies and spectacular colourised archives

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The team visit New Brunswick, where they uncover vintage automobiles, a retro coffin and a collector's bargain-priced inventory

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate an Italian mountain that has stood witness to inexplicable phenomena for centuries, wondering whether it could somehow be attracting alien visitors

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Investigations into the possibility that extraterrestrials with a superior knowledge of science and engineering landed on Earth thousands of years ago

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts finds out about discoveries that shed light on the Tudor Age, visiting excavations at Shakespeare's first theatre in London's Shoreditch and at his last home in Stratford-upon-Avon, where clues reveal his economical use of money. In Wales, she meets a team of archaeologists learning about the realities of Henry VIII's dissolution of the monasteries, while the history of a forgotten royal palace is uncovered on the banks of the Thames

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd

programme.title: Digging for Britain

In Wales, she meets a team of archaeologists learning about the realities of Henry VIII's dissolution of the monasteries, while the history of a forgotten royal palace is uncovered on the banks of the Thames

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In a Roman-themed first edition, she examines the mystery surrounding the skeletons of 97 babies found beside the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon and a cult figure buried for 1,700 years beneath a fort

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores archaeological digs at sites dating back to the Viking age, offering an insight into how the seafaring warriors from Scandinavia lived across Britain. In the Outer Hebrides, she examines signs of the earliest Norse settlers, before inspecting a collection of silver and gold pieces discovered in York. There is also a look at some of the most treasured Viking finds, including 12th-century ivory chess figures the Lewis Chessmen

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Frankton, of December 1942. The mission was for Royal Marines to place limpet mines on German ships in the occupied Bordeaux Harbour, 62 miles along the Gironde River. Five cockleshell canoes set off from submarine HMS Tuna at the mouth of the river. Only two reached the harbour and carried out the raid, escaping with the aid of the French Resistance. The damage to the ships and the resulting disruption to German supply lines had a significant impact on the war effort

programme.desc: Jim is forced to miss Cece's first recital after a major investor exits his company. Meanwhile, Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from leaving the office, and Nellie accidentally exposes Pete and Erin

programme.sub-title: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santa's Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.desc: The team tries to track down a media-savvy bank robbers who consider themselves a band of modern-day Robin Hoods, funnelling stolen cash back into their struggling neighbourhood. Hondo and Deacon clash over how to deal with a group of cops' racist views

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When four escaped prisoners take control of a courthouse with Hondo and Deacon inside but unarmed, the two race to save the lives of innocent civilians while trying to avoid detection themselves. Plus, street visits his mother Karen in hospital and faces a pivotal decision

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is persuaded to go undercover to win the trust of Fat Tony as part of an FBI operation to bring the mobster down after an incident involving recycling responsibilities and bribery. With the voice of Jon Hamm (Mad Men)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santa's Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Pam swears revenge on the person who vandalised her warehouse mural - and seeks the help of Dwight and Nellie to track down the culprit. Meanwhile, Darryl becomes frustrated with Jim's uncleanliness in their apartment, and Angela begrudgingly allows Oscar and Kevin to attend her son Phillip's first birthday party

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: The employees pair into couples to take advantage of a Valentine's Day discount at a mini-mall. Meanwhile, Erin decides that she is going to break up with Andy so she can be with Pete, who begins to doubt her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tension between Springfield Elementary's fourth and fifth graders spills over during a dodgeball game, leading Bart to arrange a fight with a fellow pupil. Marge gets back in touch with three friends she fell out with years ago, but she soon realises why they went their separate ways

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe achieves massive success when he turns the tavern into a gay bar, but keeps his heterosexuality a secret to remain in his new clientele's favour. However, the decision backfires when the pub's new regulars encourage him to run for office and become Springfield's first openly gay councilman. Meanwhile, Principal Skinner falls for a new music teacher. Guest starring Kristen Wiig (Bridesmaids) and Alyson Hannigan (How I Met Your Mother)

programme.title: Best Medicine
programme.desc: Surgeon Martin Best leaves his hospital job in Boston to begin a private doctor's practice in the small fishing village of Port Wenn, Maine, where he holidayed as a child. Local teacher Louisa Gavin questions his harsh demeanour, while Martin quickly gets annoyed by the antics of the residents, all while hiding his debilitating aversion to blood. Comedy drama based on ITV series Doc Martin, starring Josh Charles

programme.title: Best Medicine
programme.desc: Martin encounters his childhood bully and identifies a contagious disease, forcing him to cancel the town's monthly bean supper - much to the locals' anger

programme.title: Bear Grylls Is Running Wild
programme.desc: Bear takes actress Elizabeth Banks on a thrilling journey through a frigid wilderness, navigating the challenges posed by a melting glacier and the icy waters that surround it

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick brings the team together to find Monroe and save him from the Wesenrein. Juliette learns more about her new reality as a Hexenbiest. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie begs Glenn to keep quiet about the walkers in Hershel's barn - but he ends up blurting it out to Dale, who confronts the farmer about his undead captives, saying they need to be killed once and for all. The secret of Lori's pregnancy is also out, with word of her affair eventually getting back to Rick, while Shane and Andrea grow close when he takes her off for gun training. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Jeffrey DeMunn, Andrew Lincoln and Sarah Wayne Callies

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: The dog unit deals with a man who has barricaded himself in his house with his Rottweiler, while a woman thought to have overdosed disappears

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Aloha. Malama Pono (Farewell and Take Care)
programme.desc: While investigating a dangerous South American terrorist - believed to be linked to the death of multiple CIA agents - the gang tries to help Kono, who is on the run following the murder she was wrongly accused of. Elsewhere, McGarrett tries to shed some light on his mother's relationship with Wo-Fat and pays a visit to his nemesis in prison, but their heart-to-heart takes a dramatic turn. Crime drama, starring Alex O'Loughlin and Scott Caan

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.desc: Following the wildlife of a South African mangrove forest through the changing seasons, meeting the red-claw mangrove crabs that keep the forest clean

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: In the arid climes of the Arabian Peninsula, the animal kingdom answers to one true ruler - the merciless golden orb in the sky, who beats down his fury on the scorched sands until monsoons bring relief. But certain animals, from rugged dromedary camels and illusionist lizards to adorable rock hyraxes, have special adaptations to beat the desert heat

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
programme.desc: A look at the stark karst plateau of caves and dry peaks in Austria's Totes Gebirge, hiding rich ecosystem where wildlife thrives against the odds

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Following the lives of orphas in the Nyaru Menteng Orangutan Rescue Centre in Borneo, the largest rehabilitation centre of its type in the world. A new term starts at the Orangutan Jungle School in Borneo, as newbie Bumi struggles to focus and star student Valentino experiences a bumpy start to college

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: Documentary following the Luangwa Valley's transition from lush paradise to parched desert. It's the end of November and the rains have begun, ending a brutal dry season and beginning the transition to luscious wetland

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.sub-title: Okavango: The Lifeblood of the Kalahari
programme.desc: A look at the Okavango Delta, one of Africa's most abundant and diverse wildlife areas

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Concerns for chimp Jestah who has a lump on his jaw. Lemurs Fennel and Ben trial life with the guenons but youngster Biff proves a bit full on

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team explore Mary King's Close, a 17th-century building in Edinburgh reported to house the spirits of victims of the plague. A child's head, a severed arm and a girl in a blue dress are among the spooky phenomena to have been spotted there

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Kinnitty Castle in Co Offaly, Republic of Ireland, where they experience eerie goings-on

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits Castle Leslie in Co Monaghan, Ireland, a family home which is haunted by unknown spirits. With Yvette Fielding and spirit medium Derek Acorah

programme.title: Deep Sea (2023)
programme.desc: Shenxiu was abandoned by her mother when she was a child. Since then, she has bad dreams about a monster called Nightmare. One day, she travels on a cruise ship with her family. On a stormy night, she falls and breaks into the fancy Deep Sea restaurant. She meets the Chef, Nanhe, and embarks on a mysterious journey. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Brian Flaccus and Angela Malhotra

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: 10 Lives (2024)
programme.desc: A spoiled, selfish cat carelessly loses his ninth life, but winds up being reincarnated as a different animal in each of his next lives. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mo Gilligan, Simone Ashley and Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets (2022)
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog fights alongside Superman in Metropolis, thwarting the evil schemes of arch-nemesis Lex Luthor. Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthor's former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter escapees to save the day. Animated comedy adventure, featuring the voices of Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Kate McKinnon, Vanessa Bayer and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: The Pirates! In an Adventure with Scientists! (2012)
programme.desc: The bungling leader of a band of inept buccaneers is determined to prove his worth to his rivals and win the coveted Pirate of the Year award. An encounter with the naturalist Charles Darwin gives him the chance to pull off a daring crime - if he can survive coming face to face with the pirate-hating Queen Victoria. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Grant, Martin Freeman, Imelda Staunton and David Tennant

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie (2016)
programme.desc: When a peaceful island is visited by mysterious green piggies, its up to Red, Bomb and Chuck, outcast flightless birds, to get to the bottom of the suspicious invaders. Animation, with the voices of Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride, Maya Rudolph and Bill Hader

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2 (2019)
programme.desc: Red joins forces with Leonard's team as the flightless birds and scheming green pigs take their war to the next level. When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck's sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely superteam to save their homes. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Peter Dinklage, Tiffany Haddish and Dove Cameron

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Park's Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Corpse Bride (2005)
programme.desc: Shy bridegroom Victor unintentionally gets himself hitched to a ghostly bride, who lures him down into the netherworld. But as he strives to find his way back to the land of the living, a treacherous aristocrat is scheming to marry Victor's flesh-and-blood fiancee. Tim Burton's stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson, Christopher Lee and Richard E Grant

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation (2018)
programme.desc: Count Dracula and company participate in a cruise for sea-loving monsters, unaware that their boat is being commandeered by the monster-hating Van Helsing family. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg and Selena Gomez

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Peter Dinklage, Tiffany Haddish and Dove Cameron

programme.title: Monster Family (2017)
programme.desc: A young family is cursed by a witch and transformed into monsters. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Monster Family 2 (2021)
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter, so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire, Frankenstein's monster, a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Corpse Bride (2005)
programme.desc: Shy bridegroom Victor unintentionally gets himself hitched to a ghostly bride, who lures him down into the netherworld. But as he strives to find his way back to the land of the living, a treacherous aristocrat is scheming to marry Victor's flesh-and-blood fiancee. Tim Burton's stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson, Christopher Lee and Richard E Grant

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation (2018)
programme.desc: Count Dracula and company participate in a cruise for sea-loving monsters, unaware that their boat is being commandeered by the monster-hating Van Helsing family. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg and Selena Gomez

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Mr Peabody and Sherman (2014)
programme.desc: A super-intelligent talking dog invents a time machine and adopts a human boy to assist with his experiments. The curious youngster cannot resist meddling with the invention - with disastrous results - and the duo have to journey into the past to undo the damage done to the course of history. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ty Burrell and Max Charles

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank (2022)
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound named Hank finds himself in a town full of cats, who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's evil plot to wipe their village off the map. With help from a reluctant teacher to train him, Hank must assume the role of town samurai and team up with the villagers to save the day. Animated comedy, with the voices of Michael Cera, Ricky Gervais and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Sneaks (2024)
programme.desc: Ty is a designer trainer who lives a life of luxury and comfort. However, when a shady shoe collector steals his sister, Ty, is forced to venture out into the world, and onto the streets of New York, to rescue her. Animated comedy, with the voices of Anthony Mackie, Keith David and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Monster Family (2017)
programme.desc: A young family is cursed by a witch and transformed into monsters. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A doctor who works at an abortion clinic is shot in his apartment by a sniper, convincing the detectives a pro-life activist is to blame. An elderly couple who have chained themselves to a radiator in protest at the clinic's activities help the team, who face a race against time to catch the killer

programme.title: Cúl Stáitse - Oireachtas 2025
programme.desc: Since it first began over 125 years ago the Oireachtas festival has hosted some of the most prestigious competitions in traditional arts and has grown from an event frequented by the hundreds to now been one of the most important cultural events in Ireland. This year's festival in Belfast had over 1,000 competitors taking to the stage in song, music, dancing and storytelling competitions. This documentary follows the competitors, some taking to the stage for the first time, others returning veterans, while all strive for perfection and a place in the history books

programme.desc: When a man refuses to take a drug test at his sober living house, he is evicted and accused of property damage; he sues for emotional distress.

programme.title: Britain's Almost Perfect Murders
programme.desc: The story of ex-soldier Jason Hill, who walked free after killing gangster Eugene Hinds in Leicester, boasting of the perfect murder. Hinds' friends gunned him down in a club.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Serial Killer in the Making?
programme.desc: Jackie Malton revisits the case of Alun Kyte, the Midlands Ripper, who murdered two women near Leicestershire in 1993 and 1994.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Cliff Top Killer
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores the story of John Cooper, who murdered four people on the Pembrokeshire coast. He was convicted decades later thanks to forensic evidence.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: The story of Lauren DeWise, who was shot and killed by her abusive husband. This episode also covers the case of Cristina Ortiz-Lozano, who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: An unknown dead man leads police to a conspiracy involving an illegal taxi service and a violent gang in the UK.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Evil Walks The Streets
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores how Graham Fisher prowled the South East coast targeting vulnerable women, committing murder and assault before confessing to his crimes.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Cliff Top Killer
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores the story of John Cooper, who murdered four people on the Pembrokeshire coast. He was convicted decades later thanks to forensic evidence.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: The story of Lauren DeWise, who was shot and killed by her abusive husband. This episode also covers the case of Cristina Ortiz-Lozano, who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: Britain's Almost Perfect Murders
programme.desc: The story of ex-soldier Jason Hill, who walked free after killing gangster Eugene Hinds in Leicester, boasting of the perfect murder. Hinds' friends gunned him down in a club.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Fire crews try to save a woman trapped in her third-floor flat before smoke and flames engulf them all, and snowboarders trigger an avalanche, which then sweeps one of them away

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Nick Knowles draws on CCTV footage to report on the team of British rowers who took on the challenge of the Pacific Ocean, only for their trek to almost end in tragedy as their small boat began to sink. Plus, a road accident involving a four-year-old girl

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of what happened when a conservationist was attacked by elephants. Also, a police motorcyclist responding to an accident crashes and becomes the patient himself.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of what happened when a woman was sandwiched between two cars. Also, an eleven-year-old boy survives a cardiac arrest in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie mayoral elections are thrown into disarray when one of the candidates is stabbed to death in the polling booth while casting his vote. Can DI Jack Mooney and his team get to the bottom of this political puzzle? Ardal O'Hanlon stars

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.sub-title: Such a Mad Marriage Never Was Before
programme.desc: Comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon. Tensions rise as Frank and Lu are forced to reunite and work together on the case of a married couple in strife

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch quickly realises that the boy who tried to avenge Anna's murder is his son. Ogden is stunned but eager to accept the boy out of love for Murdoch

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A vaudeville comic's death leads Murdoch to suspect that Charlie Chaplin was the intended target. Meanwhile, Henry Higgins is elated to hear Ruth's news

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Inspector Brackenreid learns that his youngest son, Bobby, is wanted for murder, while Murdoch and Crabtree suspect old enemies are returning to harm them

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The sleuth teams up with Arthur Conan Doyle to investigate the murder of Ida Winston, a prominent member of the Toronto Paranormal Society, whose body is found exactly where it was foretold during a seance. Geraint Wyn Davies guest stars, with Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A groom is killed on his wedding day, and Murdoch soon learns the man was a homosexual and the marriage a sham, contrived to secure a substantial inheritance. The detective suspects the best man may be involved, but contemplates that the truth may be even more elaborate than he is imagining. Drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mysterious thief keeps stealing valuable treasures from under his nose, Hercule Flambeau visits Kembleford to see if Father Brown can help him to eliminate the competition. Mark Williams and John Light star in the crime drama

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents track down the killer of a man who believed he was abducted by aliens, and the case becomes more complicated when his body is stolen from the coroner's van. Van Pelt takes time off from the investigation to shop for a wedding dress. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker and Amanda Righetti

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A stock market guru's fortune is stolen, setting Charlie and Rex on the trail of a very surprising thief

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie goes undercover as a chemical engineer with a band of professional bank robbers planning a multimillion-dollar heist. She's set on unmasking the anonymous mastermind overseeing the operation, but Al keeps a close eye on his partner and former girlfriend, fearing she's in way over her head. Guest starring Sendhil Ramamurth (Heroes' Mohinder Suresh)

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Just before participating in the Dolphin Cove fun run, entrepreneur Curtis Faleafar calls Mackenzie to warn her that many lives are in danger. He later collapses, apparently poisoned, and Mackenzie is convinced his warning had some connection to his death. Away from matters of work, she also has to work out a way to stop local bathers taking shortcuts through her property. Detective drama, starring Anna Samson and Lloyd Griffith

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean-set whodunit returns for its 10th anniversary series, which promises more murders and the return of one or two familiar faces. A TV news presenter is found dead in her pool at home. DI Neville Parker is convinced her co-host is responsible. But given he was live on air at the time, how could he have done it? The return of an experienced sergeant to the island could be just what Neville needs to crack the case

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest walks in on a man standing over the body of his dead wife, while Mrs McCarthy strikes it lucky at the church bingo with the help of a fortune teller her sister has befriended. Guest starring Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective's estranged father is suspected of murder after being found standing drunk next to a dead body. programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A murder plot emerges when a skeletal corpse falls through the ceiling and on to the stage during a performance of Macbeth. The body is identified as the former owner of the theatre who had died a year earlier, leading to the re-opening of his coffin. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest walks in on a man standing over the body of his dead wife, while Mrs McCarthy strikes it lucky at the church bingo with the help of a fortune teller her sister has befriended. Guest starring Niamh Cusack

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The owner of an exclusive dating website is murdered, and although Jane is certain the victim's wife is to blame, she is released due to a lack of evidence. When holes begin to appear in her alibi, the consultant discovers a way to convict her of the crime, while the rest of the team learns that some of the women at the agency are filming their encounters with wealthy men so they can blackmail them. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a truck transporting liquid explosive is hijacked by criminals, Charlie and Rex must race against time to prevent the case from blowing sky high

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie investigates a lethal poisoning in a hotel, and using her scrupulous eye for detail to scan the scene, she notices an unusual device used to bug the phone of the suite directly above the victim's room. Such gadgets are frequently used by a rogue paramilitary group named Alpha H, giving the team reason to believe the deceased may have been collateral damage in a much bigger assassination plot

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Mooney and his team are tested when a billionaire's fiancee falls from a balcony the day before her lavish wedding. Everything points to suicide - except for the fact that the victim only painted one fingernail. With guest appearances by Denis Lawson, Elizabeth Berrington and Jemima Rooper

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwayne's assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden investigate the death of a member of the men's eight rowing team at a prestigious club. Richard Hartley came from an eminent Toronto family with a great deal of influence and was a newly appointed member of the team. However, it emerges he had recently had an argument with his coach. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedians Greg Davies and Guz Khan, Strictly co-host Claudia Winkleman and historian Lucy Worsley join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies. Savvy viewers may have noted that after 12 series, both Mitchell and Mack are running woefully short of truthful bizarre experiences to recount of themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Lucy Porter, Frankie Boyle and Ross Noble join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'next' in this extended episode. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.desc: Dave Gorman focuses on the role faith plays in modern life as he performs a series of witty stand-up shows

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.desc: The comedian performs another round of witty stand-up shows, beginning as he gets involved in shredding some naughty magazines, helps a gerbil to fulfil its destiny, and is surprised by the pictures that develop from an old-fashioned camera he finds

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: People forced out of their homes in Honduras by the notorious MS-13 gang plead their case for asylum in America. Officers discover 3,000lb of marijuana hidden in a cargo truck

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers put their lives on the line as they prepare to transfer two members of a cartel. In Laredo, a cop from Caracas, Venezuela, pleads his case for asylum in the United States

programme.title: Rick Stein's Spain
programme.desc: Having spent a series travelling across Spain and sampling classic dishes from the country's rural regions, Rick Stein draws culinary inspiration from that trip to create a series of dinner-table feasts that would befit any Spanish yuletide celebration. The chef prepares clams with serrano ham and oloroso sherry, lamb-stuffed aubergines with Moorish spices, chicken with saffron and pine nuts, and orange caramel creams

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornish Christmas
programme.desc: Part one of two. The chef celebrates Christmas in his adopted county of Cornwall, exploring the music, food and drink of the region as he takes a break from his worldwide travel adventures. As well as joining in the ancient tradition of wassailing, he prepares a goose, tests out the ice rink at Eden and enjoys the singing of Port Isaac's Fisherman's Friends

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond visit Pendine Sands in Wales to race a BMW 6 Series, a Porsche 911 and a Jaguar XKR. Hatchbacks, including the Vauxhall Astra, Mazda 3 and VW Golf, are scrutinised, while Johnny Vaughan and Denise Van Outen are the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson test-drives the Nissan Cube and the Renault Clio 182, James May examines the Jaguar XJS, while Richard Hammond investigates alternative ways of fuelling cars and puts the Cadillac CTS through its paces. Terry Wogan is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: In the final episode, Paul and Bob fish for Pike on the River Test in Hampshire, which may not be the best idea for two men of a certain age with heart problems. In the cottage where the pair are staying, they decide to invite a consultant cardiologist for dinner to talk about their medical past and their future, gaining tips on how to live the most healthy life possible. As the sun sets on the final night of their fishing expedition, Paul and Bob decide to write a eulogy for each on the riverbank

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second leg of Simon's journey begins at the Giant's Causeway, before visiting a kelp farm on Rathlin Island. He heads to the Dark Hedges in Co Antrim, one of the filming locations from Game of Thrones, and visits Belfast for the July 12 parades, discovering how the event has divided the city. He also learns more about Oliver Cromwell's influence on Ireland, attends the Gaze film festival, and meets monkeys at an animal sanctuary in the Wicklow mountains

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers look across the Channel to see how the French have influenced British food over the centuries. They prepare a roast chicken with 40 cloves of garlic, and a delicate mille feuille, and examine UK products in traditionally French areas of gastronomy, from award-winning English wines to Scottish garlic

programme.title: Rick Stein's Spain
programme.desc: Having spent a series travelling across Spain and sampling classic dishes from the country's rural regions, Rick Stein draws culinary inspiration from that trip to create a series of dinner-table feasts that would befit any Spanish yuletide celebration. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Aisling Bea is joined by Alex Brooker and Katherine Ryan, while Rob Beckett teams up with Natalie Cassidy and Tom Allen to discuss the nation's favourite holidays. Jimmy Carr hosts

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain hosts as Angela Barnes, Catherine Bohart, Ed Gamble, Rhys James and Michael Odewale join regular panellist Hugh Dennis to take a comic look back on the latest events in news and politics.
